mapper.select: SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", s.stage_name AS "stageName", u.name AS "filledByName" FROM construction_log a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN project_stage s ON s.id = a.stage_id LEFT JOIN sys_account u ON u.id = a.filled_by WHERE a.id = #{id}
